violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Uncovered food in the front freezer and the back refrigerator.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Hot water dish washer is not under a vent hood.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Wall behind water heater needs repair.
